profile.summary: Production Supervisor with 12 years of experience in automotive component manufacturing. Oversaw a shift of 22 operators across 3 assembly lines and raised overall equipment effectiveness (OEE) from 74 to 89 percent in 18 months.

experiences.title: Production Supervisor
experiences.description: Shift leadership across three automotive assembly lines with full accountability for output and quality.
achievements: Raised overall equipment effectiveness (OEE) from 74 to 89 percent within 18 months through a structured TPM program.
Cut scrap on safety-critical parts from 2.8 to 0.9 percent by introducing in-line SPC checks.
Supervised a shift of 22 operators and cross-trained 6 of them to run a second machining cell.

experiences.title: CNC Machinist / Line Lead
experiences.description: Set up and operated CNC turning and milling centers for small and mid-volume runs.
achievements: Reduced average setup time per job from 50 to 30 minutes through standardized tooling and offsets.
Held tolerances within 0.005 millimeters with a first-pass yield above 99 percent on medical components.

education.degree: Associate of Applied Science, Manufacturing Technology

jobPosting.title: Production Manager
jobPosting.fullText: Lakeshore Manufacturing Group is a Tier-1 automotive supplier with 480 employees and three plants across the Midwest. We are hiring a Production Manager for our Toledo facility. Responsibilities: lead production across three shifts and roughly 60 operators, own safety, quality, delivery and cost targets, drive continuous-improvement initiatives, and manage capital planning for new equipment. Requirements: a technical degree or equivalent trade qualification, several years of production experience in a manufacturing environment, and proven leadership skills. We offer a permanent contract, a performance bonus, and 401(k) matching. Your point of contact is Mr. David Hughes, Plant Manager. Please share your earliest available start date and salary expectation.
